revision.comment: /* top */ Mention {{visible anchor}} per [[User:Pokechu22]]'s request, though more concise.
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R to anchor |name=To an embedded anchor |from=a topic that does not have its own page |to=an [[Help:Link#Specifics|embedded anchor]] on the redirect's target page |info=** An {{tlx|anchor|(anchor name)}} or {{tlx|visible anchor}} template, a [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML element with id="(anchor name)"]], or an {{para|id|(anchor name)}} parameter might be installed at the beginning of a paragraph, in or near a section header or within a [[Help:table|table]]. The anchor might also be an old section header that has been edited and is anchored within or near the new header to prevent broken internal and external links. ** Even though section headers of the general form ==(Header name)== are themselves a type of anchor, use {{tl|R to section}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects to embedded anchors }} {{Documentation}}

{{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R to anchor |name=To an embedded anchor |from=a topic that does not have its own page |to=an [[Help:Link#Specifics|embedded anchor]] on the redirect's target page |info=** An {{tlx|anchor|(anchor name)}} or {{tlx|visible anchor}} template, a [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML element with id="(anchor name)"]], or an {{para|id|(anchor name)}} parameter might be installed at the beginning of a paragraph, in or near a section header or within a [[Help:table|table]]. The anchor might also be an old section header that has been edited and is anchored within or near the new header to prevent broken internal and external links. ** Even though section headers of the general form ==(Header name)== are themselves a type of anchor, use {{tl|R to section}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects to embedded anchors }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R to anchor |name=To an embedded anchor |from=a topic that does not have its own page |to=an [[Help:Link#Specifics|embedded anchor]] on the redirect's target page |info=** An {{tlx|anchor|(anchor name)}} or {{tlx|visible anchor}} template, a [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML element with id="(anchor name)"]], or an {{para|id|(anchor name)}} parameter might be installed at the beginning of a paragraph, in or near a section header or within a [[Help:table|table]]. The anchor might also be an old section header that has been edited and is anchored within or near the new header to prevent broken internal and external links. ** Even though section headers of the general form ==(Header name)== are themselves a type of anchor, use {{tl|R to section}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects to embedded anchors }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R to anchor |name=To an embedded anchor |from=a topic that does not have its own page |to=an [[Help:Link#Specifics|embedded anchor]] on the redirect's target page |info=** An {{tlx|anchor|(anchor name)}} or {{tlx|visible anchor}} template, a [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML element with id="(anchor name)"]], or an {{para|id|(anchor name)}} parameter might be installed at the beginning of a paragraph, in or near a section header or within a [[Help:table|table]]. The anchor might also be an old section header that has been edited and is anchored within or near the new header to prevent broken internal and external links. ** Even though section headers of the general form ==(Header name)== are themselves a type of anchor, use {{tl|R to section}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects to embedded anchors }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R to anchor |name=To an embedded anchor |from=a topic that does not have its own page |to=an [[Help:Link#Specifics|embedded anchor]] on the redirect's target page |info=** An {{tlx|anchor|(anchor name)}} or {{tlx|visible anchor}} template, a [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML element with id="(anchor name)"]], or an {{para|id|(anchor name)}} parameter might be installed at the beginning of a paragraph, in or near a section header or within a [[Help:table|table]]. The anchor might also be an old section header that has been edited and is anchored within or near the new header to prevent broken internal and external links. ** Even though section headers of the general form ==(Header name)== are themselves a type of anchor, use {{tl|R to section}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects to embedded anchors }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R to anchor |name=To an embedded anchor |from=a topic that does not have its own page |to=an [[Help:Link#Specifics|embedded anchor]] on the redirect's target page |info=** An {{tlx|anchor|(anchor name)}} or {{tlx|visible anchor}} template, a [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML element with id="(anchor name)"]], or an {{para|id|(anchor name)}} parameter might be installed at the beginning of a paragraph, in or near a section header or within a [[Help:table|table]]. The anchor might also be an old section header that has been edited and is anchored within or near the new header to prevent broken internal and external links. ** Even though section headers of the general form ==(Header name)== are themselves a type of anchor, use {{tl|R to section}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects to embedded anchors }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R to anchor |name=To an embedded anchor |from=a topic that does not have its own page |to=an [[Help:Link#Specifics|embedded anchor]] on the redirect's target page |info=** An {{tlx|anchor|(anchor name)}} or {{tlx|visible anchor}} template, a [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML element with id="(anchor name)"]], or an {{para|id|(anchor name)}} parameter might be installed at the beginning of a paragraph, in or near a section header or within a [[Help:table|table]]. The anchor might also be an old section header that has been edited and is anchored within or near the new header to prevent broken internal and external links. ** Even though section headers of the general form ==(Header name)== are themselves a type of anchor, use {{tl|R to section}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects to embedded anchors }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R to anchor |name=To an embedded anchor |from=a topic that does not have its own page |to=an [[Help:Link#Specifics|embedded anchor]] on the redirect's target page |info=** An {{tlx|anchor|(anchor name)}} or {{tlx|visible anchor}} template, a [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML element with id="(anchor name)"]], or an {{para|id|(anchor name)}} parameter might be installed at the beginning of a paragraph, in or near a section header or within a [[Help:table|table]]. The anchor might also be an old section header that has been edited and is anchored within or near the new header to prevent broken internal and external links. ** Even though section headers of the general form ==(Header name)== are themselves a type of anchor, use {{tl|R to section}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects to embedded anchors }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R to anchor |name=To an embedded anchor |from=a topic that does not have its own page |to=an [[Help:Link#Specifics|embedded anchor]] on the redirect's target page |info=** An {{tlx|anchor|(anchor name)}} or {{tlx|visible anchor}} template, a [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML element with id="(anchor name)"]], or an {{para|id|(anchor name)}} parameter might be installed at the beginning of a paragraph, in or near a section header or within a [[Help:table|table]]. The anchor might also be an old section header that has been edited and is anchored within or near the new header to prevent broken internal and external links. ** Even though section headers of the general form ==(Header name)== are themselves a type of anchor, use {{tl|R to section}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects to embedded anchors }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
